message:
feat(error): integrate network reliability taxonomy into error types

Add error_kind() to WeztermError and top-level Error, classifying each
variant as transient/permanent/degraded per the network_reliability
taxonomy. This enables retry/circuit-breaker decisions based on error
classification rather than ad-hoc string matching.

- WeztermError: Timeout/CommandFailed → Transient, CliNotFound/NotRunning/
  PaneNotFound/SocketNotFound/ParseError → Permanent, CircuitOpen → Degraded
- Error: delegates to inner type for Wezterm/Io, classifies Json/Config/
  Pattern/Setup as Permanent, Policy as Degraded, Cancelled/Runtime/
  Storage/Workflow as Transient
- 7 new tests for error classification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
